title: Top Gun vs. TOPGUN: Part 1
gist: Podcast episode notes (members-only teaser) for Sailor Pulse: naval aviators Steve Walsh and Peter Cohn compare the Top Gun films against the real TOPGUN school they attended, covering the selection scramble, back-to-back dogfights, and long debriefs that define the real syllabus.

insights.claim: Two naval aviators who attended TOPGUN describe the real syllabus as defined by a reputation-driven selection scramble, the physical strain of back-to-back dogfights, and long windowless debriefs, in contrast to the Top Gun films' portrayal.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.quote: the long, windowless debriefs that define the real syllabus.
